propositions: Repoint the global signing.sign_manifest seam so all producers mint rebar.opcert.v1 Ed25519 DSSE op-certs with the ambient environment key instead of legacy per-clone HMAC.

On first signing use, auto-generate a passphrase-free Ed25519 keypair at <tracker>/.opcert-key via race-safe exclusive-create (os.link commit point, 0700 staging dir), with verify-side never creating a key.
Expand-phase read path dispatches on record shape: envelope-bearing records route to the op-cert verifier while legacy HMAC signature records route to the unchanged verify_record path.

A deleted or unreadable key is regenerated on next sign; if regeneration is impossible signing records an in-band {signed:false} outcome and the gate blocks with an OpenSSH remediation message rather than wedging.

Widen sign_result.schema.json, SignResultOut, and SignResult TypedDict to admit the envelope-bearing result shape (signature no longer required) alongside the legacy HMAC shape, and extend the verify verdict enum with invalid/unavailable/unknown_kind/unknown_scheme.
Drift-refresh and resign producers must re-sign as op-certs so a refresh never downgrades a certified op-cert back to an HMAC record.
